items.title: Presentation: Confidently Automating Changes Across a Diverse Fleet
items.summaryShort: Presentation: Confidently Automating Changes Across a Diverse Fleet. Netflix engineer Casey Bleifer shares how to achieve rapid, automated code changes across a massive, diverse software fleet.

items.title: IBM Vault Enterprise 2.0 Brings Automated LDAP Secrets Management to Enterprise Identity Security
items.summaryShort: IBM Vault Enterprise 2.0 Brings Automated LDAP Secrets Management to Enterprise Identity Security. IBM and HashiCorp have announced new LDAP secrets management capabilities in IBM Vault Enterprise 2.0, introducing a redesigned architecture

items.title: Microsoft Foundry Adds Runtime, Tooling, and Governance for Production Agents
items.summaryShort: Microsoft Foundry Adds Runtime, Tooling, and Governance for Production Agents. Microsoft used their Build 2026 event to announce new functionality for Microsoft Foundry.

items.title: AWS Releases Next Generation of Amazon OpenSearch Serverless

items.title: Pinterest Uses Content Fingerprints for URL Deduplication across Millions of Domains
items.summaryShort: Pinterest Uses Content Fingerprints for URL Deduplication across Millions of Domains. Pinterest introduced MIQPS, a URL normalization system that identifies which query parameters affect page identity using rendered content fingerprints.

items.title: Top Lucid Motors executive departs amid new CEO's leadership shakeup
items.summaryShort: Top Lucid Motors executive departs amid new CEO's leadership shakeup. The exec, Emad Dlala, has left just a few months after being promoted to SVP of engineering and digital, TechCrunch has learned.

items.title: Google just fired a warning shot in the AI subscription price wars
items.summaryShort: Google just fired a warning shot in the AI subscription price wars. Google just made it significantly cheaper to enjoy its budget AI subscription tier.

items.title: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot startups without a traditional VC fund
items.summaryShort: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot startups without a traditional VC fund. Instead of spending a year raising a formal venture fund, the Sabertooth VC founder used a captive network of LPs to invest in startups like Anthropic,
